_comment: Brent crude (Europe Brent Spot Price FOB) converted to GBP. The USD series is sourced from the EIA daily table at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/rbrted.htm -- EIA data is US federal public-domain. The GBP/USD spot used for the conversion is the BoE 4pm daily fix (XUDLUSS). Refreshed weekly by the editorial pipeline. TODO(source): replace with a live EIA Open Data API call once the ingest runtime supports XLS parsing, or subscribe to a commodity-price API.
